notes:
vMLX 1.5.57 checkpoint release

Highlights:
- Fresh signed and notarized checkpoint build from current pushed vMLX Python engine/app source so GitHub, updater/download metadata, and PyPI can move past the stale 1.5.56/early-1.5.57 release surface.
- Carries the current installed-app JANG runtime parity gate, bundled jang_tools source-hash parity, local JANG 2.5.31 runtime package surface, Gemma4 QAT/JANG_4M source smokes, Gemma4 tool-parser modality sentinel cleanup, Qwen/N2 Responses/tool-call tracing work, cache/L2 proof hooks, and current panel/runtime packaging surface.
- Keeps release manifest truth visible: this is a usable checkpoint release, not a claim that every open runtime/model-family row is production-green.

Verification:
- Built Sequoia and Tahoe arm64 DMGs from vMLX 1.5.57 source at commit 255e1ba72.
- Bundled Python verified vMLX engine version 1.5.57, critical vMLX source hash parity, critical jang_tools source hash parity, relocatable console-script shebangs, and critical runtime imports.
- Sequoia DMG accepted by Apple notarization id 8048a188-d2c3-410f-abd2-5accee85d420, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted, and verified by panel/scripts/verify-release-dmgs.sh.
- Tahoe DMG accepted by Apple notarization id 7507114a-a1ee-4af8-be48-aaf51b0948ce, stapled, Gatekeeper accepted, and verified by panel/scripts/verify-release-dmgs.sh.
- Checkpoint prepackage manifest was generated with explicit override because the full live model matrix still has open rows.

Known follow-up:
- Nex/N2 Pro JANGTQ runtime/cache/API/UI proof remains active; N2 JANG_1L is not claimed by this checkpoint lane.
- Gemma MXFP/JANG media/audio/video proof beyond current QAT and installed-app rows remains active.
- MiMo JANG/JANGTQ artifact/logit/quant-contract and UI/media proof remains open; replacement artifact work is separate.
- Same-model Responses direct/gateway/tunnel raw SSE parity for content deltas, function-call argument deltas, output_index correctness, and no raw XML/tool leaks remains critical across model families.
- Installed-app full model-family matrix is not fully green; this checkpoint is signed/notarized to unblock users while proof continues.

DMG SHA256:
- Sequoia: 1f925d1321b39d0ba7b6b4d8e23662fc6b2d2ac254879678a6f66ebc991fb18c
- Tahoe: b2612b9d6c1f45bddf19450cd053b977bf4461c7ddc9686ede72ecd7360a2641
